message:
Add config file system, color mode, and config subcommand

- Support .aadcrc config files (local and global)
- Add --color flag (auto/always/never) for terminal output
- Add `aadc config init/show/path` subcommands
- Integrate with rich_rust terminal color detection
- Update beads tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
